revision.comment: Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates. [[{page.name}]]
Bot: tidy & size tag (1 members)
Bot: tag as Tier 0 category
Bot: confirm enwiki category & retag
Text replacement - "↵↵" to " "
revision.text: {{Navseasoncats}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Uncategorized categories]] [[Category:3rd-century monarchs|Women]] [[Category:3rd-century women by occupation|Monarchs]] [[Category:Ancient women monarchs]] }} [[Category:Categories with 1 members]] [[en:Category:3rd-century women monarchs]] [[Category:confirmed enwiki categories]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:confirmed enwiki categories]]" to "[[en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]][[category:confirmed enwiki categories]]"
revision.text: {{Navseasoncats}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Uncategorized categories]] [[Category:3rd-century monarchs|Women]] [[Category:3rd-century women by occupation|Monarchs]] [[Category:Ancient women monarchs]] }} [[Category:Categories with 1 members]] [[en:Category:3rd-century women monarchs]] [[en:Category:3rd-century women monarchs]][[category:confirmed enwiki categories]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]]

revision.comment: Bot: remove obsolete category Categories with 1 members
Bot: remove obsolete category Confirmed enwiki categories
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Tier 1 Categories
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Uncategorized categories
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Text replacement - "==Old Content==↵==" to "=="
Text replacement - "==Old Content==↵==" to "=="
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q121032986)
Bot: remove [[Category:categories missing wikidata]] (has wikidata link)
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Bot: reorganize categories (alphabetical, deduplicated, moved to bottom)

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "{{draft categories|↵}}" to ""
adding dummy category to make categories work
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "[[Category:pages]]" to "[[Category:Categories]]"
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)
